top3.sql:
SELECT sname, administrator_email
FROM (
    SELECT s.sname, sc.Phone AS administrator_email,
           SUM(s.NumTstTakr) AS total_takers_1500
    FROM satscores s
    JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
    WHERE s.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY s.sname, sc.Phone
    ORDER BY total_takers_1500 DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT sname, administrator_email
FROM (
    SELECT s.sname, sc.Phone AS administrator_email,
           SUM(s.NumTstTakr) AS total_takers_1500
    FROM satscores s
    JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
    WHERE s.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY s.sname, sc.Phone
    ORDER BY total_takers_1500 DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT s.sname, sc.Phone AS administrator_email
FROM satscores s
JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
WHERE s.NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.NumGE1500 DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT sname, administrator_email
FROM (
    SELECT s.sname, sc.Phone AS administrator_email,
           SUM(s.NumTstTakr) AS total_takers_1500
    FROM satscores s
    JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
    WHERE s.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY s.sname, sc.Phone
    ORDER BY total_takers_1500 DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT s.sname, sc.Phone AS administrator_email
FROM satscores s
JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
WHERE s.NumGE1500 = (
    SELECT MAX(NumGE1500)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.sname, sc.Phone AS administrator_email
FROM satscores s
JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
WHERE s.NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.NumGE1500 DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT sname, administrator_email
FROM (
    SELECT s.sname, sc.Phone AS administrator_email,
           SUM(s.NumTstTakr) AS total_takers_1500
    FROM satscores s
    JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
    WHERE s.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY s.sname, sc.Phone
    ORDER BY total_takers_1500 DESC
    LIMIT 1
);
